name: G-5 aggregator: rubric/runner.sh --root <dir> walks every YAML under generated-code-quality-standards/ recursively
command:
mkdir -p tree/google && printf 'source:
  id: a
rules:
  - id: g-x-001
' > tree/google/a.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/runner.sh" --root "$PWD/tree" --format json 2>err.txt; grep -q 'g-x-001' err.txt && echo walked 1>&2
